title: Health-200 != behaviour-verified
mitigation: Pair every /health 200 with a behavioural probe (e.g. learning_health field, build SHA, calibration marker) before declaring substrate ready. AP discovered when POVM :8125 served pre-CR-2 binary while /health returned 200.

title: Silence-as-consent in multi-pane orchestration
mitigation: Peer non-response is silence, not consent. Use explicit ACK file drops in ~/projects/shared-context/agent-cross-talk/ + AskUserQuestion before progressing dependent steps.

title: Verb collapse across Phase A/B boundary
mitigation: Phase A modules (m1-m15) are PASSIVE: ingest, correlate, record, emit, refuse. Active verbs (recommend, dispatch, propose, select) belong to Phase B (m20-m33). Verb-lock enforced by v1.3.

title: POVM dual-path coupling (RESOLVED)
mitigation: m42 pivoted to stcortex-only routing 2026-05-17. Module renamed src/m42_povm_dual/ -> src/m42_stcortex_emit/. POVM dependency removed; see ADR.

title: Module-count drift across artefacts (RESOLVED)
mitigation: OI-3 reconciled at 26 modules with m1-m42 unpadded. Any artefact claiming 28/11/25 is stale; refresh from ai_specs/MODULE_MATRIX.md.

title: Padded vs unpadded module IDs
mitigation: OI-4 locked at unpadded throughout (m1, m2, m11, m42). Never m01, m02. Frontmatter parsers must accept unpadded only.

title: Auto-promotion m23 -> m30 (proposer-to-bank without human review)
mitigation: m23 proposes; humans review; m30 accepts. Bypass is a refusal-mode violation. CC-4 contract REQUIRES a review pause-state between m23 and m30.

title: Self-dispatch via m32
mitigation: m32 dispatches workflows; m32 itself is not a workflow. Recursion trap. Guard via workflow_runs_row.kind != 'dispatcher_self'.

title: Cluster D not woven first
mitigation: Trust aspect-layer (m8/m9/m10/m11) MUST ship Day 1 before any reader (Cluster A/B/C). Retrofit costs an audit of every call site. Phase 1 sequencing in deployment framework enforces.

title: LCM workspace-of-crates pattern when ORAC single-crate is correct
mitigation: Single deployment target with shared lib + 2 binaries -> ORAC single-crate pattern, not LCM 10-crate workspace. Use [[bin]] entries + src/lib.rs.

title: Active verbs in Phase A modules (m1-m15) (RESOLVED via v1.3 verb-lock)
mitigation: v1.3 verb-lock active. Phase A vocabulary: ingest, correlate, record, emit, refuse. Reviewer rejects PRs with active verbs in Phase A modules.

title: Cargo.toml-via-cargo-init inside workspace
mitigation: Pre-G9: do not cargo init at all. Post-G9: if creating a sub-crate that should NOT join parent workspace, add [workspace] = {} to isolate. Better: keep ORAC single-crate pattern.

title: Diagnostics theatre - refresh-date stamps without re-executed probes
mitigation: Every Refreshed:DATE stamp on a runbook/doc MUST be paired with '> probes re-verified live DATE' evidence (re-executed curl/sqlite/cargo output). Stale stamps hide live failures.

title: Coding without explicit 'start coding <project>' signal
mitigation: Pre-G9 (Luke has not typed 'start coding workflow-trace'): refuse any cargo init/new/build/run. PRIME_DIRECTIVE_WAIVER scope is structure + specs + .claude config only; not Rust source.

title: Watcher self-modification
mitigation: The Watcher persona is governed at Luke @ node 0.A; AP27 forbids self-modification of m46-m51 scope. Ember 7-trait unanimity gate must approve any change to watcher modules.

title: Sync HTTP in tokio::spawn (starves runtime)
mitigation: ureq/reqwest::blocking inside tokio::spawn starves the async runtime. Use reqwest::Client (async) or tokio::task::spawn_blocking for sync HTTP. Catalogued in session-225 (ORAC restoration).

title: Namespace string drift (use namespace.rs constants)
mitigation: All stcortex/POVM namespace strings live in workflow_core::namespace as const fn. Never literal string in module code. m9 namespace guard refuses writes prefixed other than workflow_trace_.

title: V8 CodeSynthor CLI hang in pipelines
mitigation: V8 CLI streams output and may hang when piped through head/tail. Use --json --no-stream or capture full output to tempfile before piping. See session-104.

title: V8 binary absence (OTP-supervised not yet up)
mitigation: V8 daemon on :8111 may be down or supervised-restarting. Probe /health before invoking v8-* binaries; fall back to JSON-output capture if HTTP unhealthy.

title: V8 JSON fallback drift (schema-version)
mitigation: V8 --json output has versioned schema; older readers may break on new fields. Always validate against codesynthor-v8 schemas/ before consuming downstream.

title: V8 OTP restart storm
mitigation: Elixir OTP supervises V8; rapid restart loops can mask root-cause (e.g. RELEASE_NAME bug fixed session-094). Inspect /var/log/v8/release_*.log before restarting.

title: V8 FD exhaustion under sustained scan
mitigation: v8-ultrascan opens many file handles; raise ulimit -n 8192 before sustained scans or batch in chunks of 500 files.

title: V8 /health path drift (not /api/health)
mitigation: V8 health is at /health (not /api/health like SYNTHEX). Probe with curl -sS localhost:8111/health.
